title: Mythos is Back, OpenAI Releases GPT 5.6, Apple’s Price Increases
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss recent AI industry news including Anthropic's Mythos, OpenAI's GPT-5.6 release, government involvement in AI access, cost pressures on frontier labs, billing transparency issues, and Apple's price increases. The episode covers business model implications and market dynamics around frontier AI model availability and pricing.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy run through a batch of recent AI industry developments: Anthropic's Mythos, OpenAI's GPT-5.6 release, government involvement in AI access, and Apple's price increases. The discussion centers on business model and market dynamics, including cost pressures on frontier labs and inference costs that shape model availability and pricing. Billing transparency surfaces as a recurring concern, with attention to billing alarms and how usage costs are surfaced to customers.
